# LatamBoard

> Open leaderboard for LLM performance on Latin American Spanish, Portuguese,
> translation, structured extraction, image extraction, and transcription
> tasks. Scores are computed from public evaluation suites and served as JSON
> from Hugging Face; the website (this domain) is a thin client-side
> visualization on top of that dataset.

## Live data (single source of truth)

All benchmark data is served directly from a public Hugging Face dataset. Each
file is plain JSON, curl-able with no auth.

- [leaderboard_table.json](https://huggingface.co/datasets/LatamBoard/leaderboard-results/resolve/main/leaderboard_table.json):
  one row per model. Columns include `model_name`, `publisher`,
  `overall_latam_score`, `spanish_score`, `portuguese_score`,
  `translation_score`, `structured_extraction_score`, plus per-subtask columns
  (naming convention: `{group}_{subtask}`).
- [tasks_groups.json](https://huggingface.co/datasets/LatamBoard/leaderboard-results/resolve/main/tasks_groups.json):
  category → task-list mapping. Categories include `latam_es` (Spanish),
  `latam_pr` (Portuguese), `translation`, `structured_extraction`, and any
  additional groups the maintainers have added.
- [tasks_list.json](https://huggingface.co/datasets/LatamBoard/leaderboard-results/resolve/main/tasks_list.json):
  per-task metadata — description, source dataset link, language.

Dataset home (browse, versions, revisions):
<https://huggingface.co/datasets/LatamBoard/leaderboard-results>

## Paper (project background, methodology, citation)

- [About / manuscript](https://latamboard.ai/about.html): Quarto-rendered
  paper — "LatamBoard: On the missing benchmarks layer and a potential
  solution". Contains abstract, authors, methodology, dataset description,
  results, and citation block.

## Project home

- <https://latamboard.ai> — the visual leaderboard (client-side React; not a
  data source).
- <https://github.com/surus-lat/latam-leaderboard> — source code.
